meaning: n.不平等,不同,不等式,不平均,(表面)不平坦(用复数)
examples: Inequality is also an engine of protest.
Self-esteem helps to combat gender inequality in the workplace.
His successor, Yasuo Fukuda, has pledged to continue along the path of reform while addressing inequality.
Its Gini index, a measure of income inequality, dropped from 0.63 to 0.52 from 1989 to 2009.
